name: Honey Spice Balls
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease cookie sheets. Beat butter and brown sugar in a large bowl with an electric mixer until creamy. Add egg, honey, and vanilla; beat until light and fluffy. Stir in flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg until well blended. Shape tablespoonfuls of dough into balls; roll in oats. Place 2 inches apart on prepared cookie sheets. Bake 15-18 minutes until cookie tops crack slightly. Cool 1 minute on cookie sheets. Remove to wire racks; cool completely. Store in an airtight container.
